comments.author: @sarachamberlain2666
comments.text: Several years ago I had a tour trip scheduled to Ireland. Then I came down very sick, requiring surgery. I didn’t get to go of course. And since then my health has prevented me from planning another trip. So watching videos of Ireland are very enjoyable. Thank you.

comments.author: @RubieCierrak1
comments.text: The landscape is stunning. Thank you for sharing such a beautiful journey
